params._from: Address of the msg.sender of sendETH on the source chain.

relayETH(address,address,uint256).notice: Relays ETH received from another chain.

sendETH(address,uint256).notice: Sends ETH to some target address on another chain.

relayETH(address,address,uint256).notice: Relays ETH received from another chain.

sendETH(address,uint256).notice: Sends ETH to some target address on another chain.

RelayETH(address,address,uint256,uint256.notice: Emitted whenever ETH is successfully relayed on this chain.

SendETH(address,address,uint256,uint256).notice: Emitted when ETH is sent from one chain to another.

InvalidCrossDomainSender().notice: Thrown when attempting to relay a message and the cross domain message sender is not SuperchainETHBridge.

ZeroAddress().notice: Thrown when attempting to perform an operation and the account is the zero address.

userdoc.notice: SuperchainETHBridge enables ETH transfers between chains within an interop cluster.
